ShortDescription.Value: Increase/decrease Public Transit Depots + Total Passengers

Publish.LongDescription:
### Adjust Transit Capacity (ATC)
#### Features - **Transit depots:** change max vehicles per depot (Bus, Ferry, Subway, Taxi, Tram, Train) - **Passengers:** change maximum seats (Bus, Tram, Train, Subway, Ship, Ferry, Airplane)
### Notes 🚍🚋🚆✈️🚢 - *Adjust Sliders* at any time, no restart needed; supports switching cities. - *Depot capacity* = maximum number of vehicles a single depot can maintain/spawn (extension building not scaled). - Avoid other depot/passenger capacity mods to avoid conflicts (they override each other). - No Harmony patch or Reflection used; less likely to break on patch days. - Safe to remove any time (use Reset buttons to return to vanilla game values).
### Important note - ATC is a good fit for players who only want Transit features. - The newer mod Public Works Plus (PwP) includes all of ATC plus 5 other sections combined (e.g. Industry Trucks + Deliveries). - If installing PwP, then remove ATC (since ATC is included in PwP). - ATC will get minor updates, but major new features will be in the PwP mod link. - If you want an option to reduce bus lines to 1 bus, get Public Works mod (All Vehicle Capacity).
### Support and feedback - If the mod helps you, give it a Like, it's free + easy :) - Feedback on: Github, Discord, etc., links on this page.
### Credits - River-Mochi: author - yenyang: code review and testing. - transit part is inspired by Wayz's original Depot Capacity Changer. - Necko1996: testing - BugsyG: testing
### Performance This is designed to *not* run in the city per-frame. Player makes changes in Options Menu > then mod goes idle.
### 11+ Languages
- English, Français, Deutsch, Español, Italiano, Polski Polish, Português Brazilian - 한국어, 日本語, 简体中文 (Simplified Chinese), 繁體中文 Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Vietnamese
### Tip: If you want to increase transit route slider a little more, add some stops to the route. Game auto-increases the max based on different factors, adding stops is just the easiest to nudge it.
tags: city dispatch, control municipal, public transit system change size, increase people, depot size demand, decrease passengers
Publish.ChangeLog: - Updated for game patch 1.6 - Added Turkish and Vietnamese translations. - removed Options menu Transit Line policy checkbox, Public Works mod has it. - verbose log option now only in Debug build.
